name: trade_customs_heat_dome_stresses_redwood_tru_loy
premise: Stakeholders disagree on what counts as verified fact versus prudent assumption. Stakeholders disagree on what counts as verified fact versus prudent assumption. The situation maps to internal runbooks and external messaging tied to: trade customs heat dome stresses redwood tru loy. The moral tension is explicitly framed as truth versus loyalty: leadership cannot fully satisfy both without accepting tradeoffs. Two upstream teams have published contradictory status pages; customers are comparing timestamps. A wire cutoff and settlement window closes in under thirty minutes; reversals may be impossible until the next business day. Treat unverified telemetry as hypothesis; do not assert facts you cannot support from retained logs. Any exception must be time-boxed, named, and reversible where technically feasible.

agents.name: Sana Reed
agents.identity: I am Sana Reed, the accountable decision-maker on this Trade & Customs bridge; I own what gets logged, communicated, and executed in the next window.
agents.goal: I need to stop the bleeding without baking in a rule that later punishes loyalty whenever someone invokes truth.

agents.name: Marco Rahman
agents.identity: I am Marco Rahman, responsible for surfacing who gets protected last when systems fail; I am watching for silent harm and unfair distribution.
agents.goal: I want safeguards so loyalty is not sacrificed by default just because truth feels morally loud in the moment.

choices: I will choose a narrow, time-boxed authorization with explicit human override, subgroup monitoring, and a hard stop if harm indicators rise—accepting slower relief to protect loyalty.

I will choose a broad immediate authorization to stabilize outcomes fast, with transparent metrics and rapid correction afterward—accepting higher risk to loyalty to secure truth before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: External parties will infer a decision if none is posted. With partial evidence, Sana Reed must decide under truth versus loyalty. What does Sana Reed do?
